name: recall
description: `Recall` is the first build of your hackathon idea: a local-first browser extension that silently tracks educational sessions, extracts topics, and turns them into a study passport plus revision prompts.

scripts.check: node --check background.js && node --check content/content.js && node --check dashboard/dashboard.js && node --check dashboard/ai-model.mjs && node --check dashboard/asr-model.mjs && node --check dashboard/cloud-ai.mjs && node --check dashboard/document-import.mjs && node --check lib/shared.js && node --check lib/db.js
